name: Light Chicken Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound skinless boneless chicken breast, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly spray a Dutch oven with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Add chicken to the pot. Cook over medium-high heat until chicken is just tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in onion, garlic, broth, chili peppers, cumin, and white pepper.
4. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, uncovered.
5. Divide tortillas among 4 soup bowls.
6. Spoon the chili into each bowl and top with olives and cheese.
7. Serve immediately.
